title: Cloudflare outage on November 18, 2025
licence: (c) Cloudflare, all rights reserved. Fetched at eval time and never committed; local evaluation only.
expectedCharacteristics: Reconstructs a timeline slide from the incident table
Keeps the causal chain intact: permissions change -> duplicated feature rows -> file exceeds the preallocation limit -> panic. A weak deck says only 'a config error'
Treats the DDoS red herring as its own 'why diagnosis was slow' beat and closes on remediations
